title: Vercel MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Vercel MCP Server for Claude
Manage deployments, analyze logs, and control Vercel projects
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Vercel
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `deployment` `vercel` `hosting` `devops` `infrastructure`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http vercel https://mcp.vercel.com && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "vercel": {
    "url": "https://mcp.vercel.com",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http vercel https://mcp.vercel.com && claude mcp list

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/vercel-mcp-server
